sections.heading: 1. Introduction
content: This Refund Policy outlines the terms and conditions under which Adymire Agency ("we," "our," or "the Company") processes refund requests for services rendered or payments made.
This policy applies to all clients who have engaged our services including UI/UX Design, Mobile App Development, Web Development, Digital Marketing, and AI Automation & AI-Based Solutions.
By making a payment or entering into a service agreement with us, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to the terms outlined in this Refund Policy.

sections.heading: 2. General refund policy
content: Due to the nature of software development, design, and digital marketing services, refunds are evaluated on a case-by-case basis. The following principles govern our refund policy:
bullets: Refunds are NOT automatic and are subject to company evaluation
All refund requests must be submitted in writing via email
The Company reserves the right to approve or deny refund requests based on the circumstances of each case
Final decision regarding refunds rests solely with the Company

sections.heading: 3. Non-refundable items
content: The following items and scenarios are strictly NON-REFUNDABLE:

subSections.heading: 3.1 Initial deposits and advance payments
bullets: Any deposit or advance payment made to initiate a project is non-refundable
This includes initial consultation fees, discovery fees, or booking amounts

subSections.heading: 3.2 Completed work
content: If any deliverable has been completed and provided to the client, the payment for that deliverable is non-refundable. Completed work includes but is not limited to:
• Design mockups, wireframes, or prototypes
• Developed features or modules
• Delivered marketing campaigns or content
• Research, analysis, or strategy documents

subSections.heading: 3.3 Work in progress
bullets: If work has been initiated and is in progress, the Company will assess the work completed to date
Refunds, if approved, will be calculated based on work remaining, not work completed
The Company may retain payment for all work completed up to the refund request date

subSections.heading: 3.4 Third-party costs
content: Any expenses incurred on behalf of the client are non-refundable, including:
• Domain registrations
• Hosting fees
• Third-party software licenses
• Stock assets (images, fonts, templates)
• Advertising spend (Google Ads, Facebook Ads, etc.)
• API subscriptions or integrations
• Payment gateway fees

subSections.heading: 3.5 Custom development and design
bullets: Custom-developed software, applications, or designs are non-refundable once delivered
This includes source code, design files, or any intellectual property created specifically for the client

subSections.heading: 3.6 Change of mind
bullets: Refunds will not be provided if the client changes their mind about the project after work has commenced
Clients are advised to carefully review proposals and agreements before making payments

sections.heading: 4. Refund eligibility
content: Refunds may be considered under the following specific circumstances:

subSections.heading: 4.1 Non-delivery of services
bullets: If the Company fails to deliver agreed-upon services within the mutually agreed timeline without valid reasons
The client must provide written notice and allow the Company a reasonable opportunity to remedy the situation

subSections.heading: 4.2 Duplicate payment
bullets: If a client has accidentally made a duplicate payment, the excess amount will be refunded after verification

subSections.heading: 4.3 Service not as described
bullets: If the delivered service significantly deviates from the agreed scope and the Company is unable to rectify the issue
The client must provide clear evidence of the deviation

subSections.heading: 4.4 Company-initiated cancellation
bullets: If the Company is unable to fulfill the service agreement due to internal reasons, a refund will be processed
This does not apply if the cancellation is due to client-side issues

sections.heading: 5. Refund request process
content: To request a refund, clients must follow this process:

subSections.heading: Step 1: Submit a written request
content: Send an email to our official email address with the subject line: "Refund Request - [Your Project Name/ID]"
Include the following details:
• Your full name and contact information
• Project details and invoice number
• Reason for the refund request
• Any supporting documentation or evidence

subSections.heading: Step 2: Company review
content: Our team will review your request within 7-14 business days
We may request additional information or clarification during this period

subSections.heading: Step 3: Decision notification
content: You will be notified of the decision via email
If approved, we will provide details on the refund amount and processing timeline
If denied, we will provide a clear explanation for the decision

subSections.heading: Step 4: Refund processing (if approved)
content: Approved refunds will be processed within 15-30 business days from the approval date
Refunds will be issued to the original payment method
Bank transfer refunds may take additional time depending on the bank's processing

sections.heading: 6. Partial refunds
content: In certain cases, the Company may offer a partial refund based on:
• The percentage of work completed
• Resources and time already invested
• Third-party costs incurred
• Revisions and iterations provided
The calculation of partial refunds is at the sole discretion of the Company.

sections.heading: 7. Refund processing time
bullets: Approved refunds will be initiated within 15-30 business days
The actual credit to your account may take additional time depending on your bank or payment provider
For international clients, currency conversion and international transfer fees may apply

sections.heading: 8. Chargebacks and disputes
bullets: Clients are required to contact the Company directly for refund requests before initiating chargebacks
Unauthorized chargebacks may result in:
-Suspension of services
-Legal action to recover costs
-Blacklisting from future services
If you have initiated a dispute with your payment provider, please inform us immediately

subSections.heading: 9.1 Subscription-based services
content: • For recurring services or subscriptions:
bullets: Refunds are not provided for the current billing period
Cancellations must be made before the next billing cycle
Prorated refunds are not offered

subSections.heading: 9.2 Revisions and modifications
bullets: Requests for revisions beyond the agreed number are not grounds for refunds
Additional revisions may be charged separately

subSections.heading: 9.3 Client-side delays
content: Refunds will not be provided if project delays are caused by:
• Late provision of required information or assets
• Lack of client availability for feedback or approvals
• Changing requirements or scope creep

sections.heading: 10. Company's right to refuse refunds
content: The Company reserves the right to refuse refunds if:
bullets: The refund request is made after the agreed project completion date
The client has violated the Terms & Conditions or other policies
The request is deemed unreasonable or made in bad faith
The work has been delivered and accepted by the client

sections.heading: 11. Alternatives to refunds
content: Instead of refunds, the Company may offer:
bullets: Service credits for future projects
Modifications or corrections to the delivered work
Extended support or additional features
Transfer of unused portion to another service
sections.note: These alternatives are offered at the Company's discretion.

sections.heading: 12. Taxes and fees
bullets: Refund amounts will be calculated based on the net amount paid (excluding taxes and processing fees)
Applicable taxes (GST, VAT, etc.) will be adjusted according to local tax regulations
Payment gateway fees are non-refundable

sections.heading: 13. Changes to this policy
content: We reserve the right to update or modify this Refund Policy at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting on our website.
Your continued use of our services after changes are made constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

sections.heading: 14. Contact information
content: For refund requests or questions about this policy, please contact us:
Adymire Agency
Email: [Your Official Email]
Phone: [Your Official Phone Number]
Website: [Your Website URL]
Address: [Your Registered Business Address]

sections.heading: 15. Acceptance of this policy
content: By making a payment or engaging our services, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to this Refund Policy.
If you do not agree with any part of this policy, please do not proceed with payment or service engagement.
